FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Initial version
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Initial version. Mod already in alpha.

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Minor update
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Minor update to account for a class rename in the main Empire Refactored mod.

FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.label: Events backend change
FactionColonies.PatchNoteDef.description: Update to handle Empire Refactored's new events API.
